sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀναφαίνω

- Transliteration: Anaphaino

- Phonetic: an-af-ah'-ee-no

- Definition:

1. to bring to light, hold up to view, show

2. to appear, be made apparent

- Origin: from G303 and G5316

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G5316; to show that is (reflexively) appear or (passively) have pointed out: - (should) appear discover.
